structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-08-26 Nova Advantage DPA Update to Eligibility Parameters
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-08-26 12:59:44-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

The investor partner for the Nova Advantage DPA program has shared updates to their eligibility parameters. Please read below for details. 

 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Down Payment Assistance

Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Eg41dbIVdE9CiY99irp6WokB6ENijev1_Z3Svq9oHql8Jg?e=KUHgQ5> 

 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Forgivable 3.5% assistance

	*	Minimum representative score of 640 (previously 620)

*	Repayable 3.5% or 5% assistance

	*	Minimum representative score of 660

*	Temp 2-1 buydowns available
*	Manufactured homes permitted (single-wide units ineligible)
*	TBD address permitted
*	Max DTI per AUS approval
*	1-2 Units permitted

IMPORTANT NOTES

DPA options that permit FICOs of 600+ include Arrive Home and Chenoa. Please refer to the guidelines linked below. 

*	 Chenoa <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Ep_RO69rsDlIvq3wcke8tgUB9svhvmM6qCGLnRFlPTPOJA?e=NZ7IYJ> 
*	 Arrive Home <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Ej-CfoYL3whPqy6c9zElc6MBywteQv8gHU44duYtkKG6JQ?e=Sm6uWL> 

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

For inquiries, contact: 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Dept <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
